title: staelia galioides
intro: Staelia galioides, also known as the 'galliwasp plant', is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Staelia galioides include its potential to reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms of various ailments such as fever and wounds. Herbal preparations of Staelia galioides include teas and infusions made by steeping the leaves in hot water, which are used to harness its medicinal properties.
